# harvester_kubeovn_subnet (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_subnet" "example" {
  name = "ovn-default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `allow_subnets` (List of String)
- `cidr_block` (String)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `dhcp_v4_options` (String)
- `enable_dhcp` (Boolean)
- `enable_lb` (Boolean)
- `exclude_ips` (List of String)
- `gateway` (String)
- `gateway_node` (String)
- `gateway_type` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `namespaces` (List of String)
- `nat_outgoing` (Boolean)
- `network_provider` (String)
- `private` (Boolean)
- `protocol` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `v4_available_ips` (Number)
- `v4_using_ips` (Number)
- `vlan` (String)
